name: dropdown-menu
title: Dropdown Menu
description: A composed menu of application actions revealed from a trigger, built on Base UI's Menu: role=menu popup with roving focus, first-letter typeahead, checkbox and radio items, grouped labels, destructive items, and nested submenus. Portalled and collision-aware, with logical sides that flip in RTL and 44px item targets. A menu of actions, not site navigation.
useWhen: A trigger that reveals a compact set of actions (a row's More menu, a table row's edit/duplicate/delete actions)
An account or profile menu of actions (settings, sign out)
Toggling display state with checkbox items, or picking one option in a group with radio items
Grouping related actions, optionally nesting less-common ones in a submenu
avoidWhen: Primary site navigation between pages (use a nav landmark with links, not a menu of actions)
A single on/off control (use a Button or a Checkbox)
A long, filterable set of choices bound to a form value (use the Combo Box)
Selecting one value from a short, always-relevant list in a form (use the Select)

keyboard: The trigger exposes aria-haspopup=menu and toggles aria-expanded
Enter, Space, or Down Arrow on the trigger opens the menu and moves focus to the first item
Up Arrow and Down Arrow rove between items (roving focus); the list loops at the ends by default
Home jumps to the first item; End jumps to the last item
Typing a character moves the highlight to the next item beginning with it (first-letter typeahead)
Enter or Space activates the highlighted item and closes the menu (actions close by default; checkbox and radio items stay open)
Escape closes the menu and returns focus to the trigger
Right Arrow opens a submenu and focuses its first item; Left Arrow closes it back to the submenu trigger (mirrored in RTL)
Disabled items stay reachable by the arrow keys (the APG focusable-disabled pattern) but carry aria-disabled and cannot be activated
Checkbox items expose aria-checked (menuitemcheckbox) and radio items expose aria-checked (menuitemradio)
